title: Chamaeiris collina
taxonomy: Chamaeiris collina is classified as a species of butterfly in the family Lycaenidae. This butterfly is part of the genus Chamaeiris, which includes several species. The Lycaenidae family is a large and diverse group of butterflies commonly known as gossamer-winged butterflies. Lycaenidae is further divided into several subfamilies, with Chamaeiris collina belonging to the subfamily Polyommatinae. This classification reflects the butterfly's physical and behavioral characteristics.
